generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Important security update! 🚨 As a fellow concerned citizen, I wanted to share insights from my work with NATO's cybersecurity advisory group. Recent alliance burden-sharing reports show that while we're contributing, some partners aren't pulling their weight. This puts our national security at risk. We must strengthen our commitments to ensure collective defense works for all. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
